name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Dallas, TX pawn shop Cash America Pawn at 12920 Midway Rd offers quick loans on jewelry, electronics, and more.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 12920 Midway Rd in Dallas, Texas. This standalone location is open Monday through Friday 9AM–7PM, Saturday 9AM–6PM, and Sunday 11AM–4PM, serving the Dallas area with convenient in-person lending.

At this Dallas location, you can pawn jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, sporting goods, and other items for immediate cash. Call (972) 239-3711 to inquire about current rates, item eligibility, or to arrange details. The staff provides transparent valuations and fair lending terms.

If you need quick cash in Dallas, TX, bring a valid ID and your item. You'll receive money on the spot while keeping ownership rights to reclaim your item within the loan period. Cash America Pawn serves Dallas residents with straightforward pawn lending.
pros: 3,300+ locations provide convenient access across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no personal liability if you default—only lose the pledged item
Immediate cash on the spot with no credit check required
Publicly traded company (listed in S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000) indicates regulatory oversight and transparency
Accepts virtually any valuable item (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Gold and precious metals buying service offers quick cash for items many people already own
Layaway service allows purchases with affordable 10% down, providing an alternative to credit
cons: Website does not disclose interest rates, terms, or loan amounts, making it impossible to compare costs
Pawn loans require surrendering personal property as collateral—risk of losing sentimental or valuable items
Layaway service requires upfront 10% payment and ongoing installments, tying up money and carrying implicit interest
As a large chain, individual stores may have less negotiating flexibility than independent pawn shops
Non-recourse structure means if you don't repay, the company sells your item—no option to recover it after default period
best_for: People with valuable items they're willing to pledge for immediate short-term cash needs
Consumers without access to credit or who want to avoid credit checks and applications
Those buying gold, jewelry, or other goods who prefer to shop second-hand or discounted inventory
People in financial crisis needing emergency cash quickly without traditional loan processing delays
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers who own valuable collateral and need immediate cash without credit checks or traditional loan approval processes. The critical caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering personal property as security, and loan terms (interest rates, repayment periods) are not transparently disclosed on their website, making it essential to visit a location or call before committing to understand the true cost of borrowing.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property collateral
Retail sales of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying—immediate cash payment
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Buy and sell of general merchandise inventory
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Store locator and inventory search tools
Online information on what items they accept and how pawn loans work
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 12920 Midway Rd, Dallas, TX. Quick pawn loans on jewelry, electronics & more. Open Mon–Fri 9AM–7PM.
